title: Nespresso Citiz Coffee Machine by De'Longhi for Original Coffee Pods, Italian Inspired Espresso, Quality Coffee, Starter Capsule Set Included, EN167.B, Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: HIGH-PERFORMANCE: 19-bar high-pressure pump and fast heat-up system (in only a few seconds); easy insertion, automatic piercing and brewing of coffee capsules
COMPACT SIZE: Award-winning compact design and intuitive, user-friendly functionalities. CitiZ delivers delicious cups of coffee with minimal hassle
EASY TO USE: 2 programmable coffee selections with automatic flow-stop for Espresso and Lungo preparations; 2 cup support positions, one for latte macchiato cups and one for espresso
ENERGY SAVING: the machine switches off automatically after 9 minutes of inactivity
COFFEE VARIETIES: Nespresso offers a wider variety of coffees to satisfy every taste at any moment of the day
